title: IIMB Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Academic Associate Posts
description: The Indian Institute of Management Bangalore (IIMB) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Academic Associate Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Post-graduation, PGDM, can apply for the IIMB Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection process...
